scale_notes: Values stored as displayed in filing iXBRL tags. Primary unit: thousands (USD). FY2019 total_debt=24,600 normalized from 24.6M (iXBRL tag in SRC_006 used _scale:6 = millions; converted to thousands for scale consistency with all other period values). FY2023-FY2025 total_liabilities includes the separately presented Redeemable Non-Controlling Interest (RNCI from Adtran Networks SE JV) from the same 10-K balance sheet source so total_assets reconcile to liabilities plus equity under the project BS identity rule. Promoted quarterlies Q1-2023 through Q3-2025 apply the same BS identity rule when the filing presents an explicit Total Liabilities and Equity bridge and a separately presented RNCI / mezzanine component for that period. FY2022 total_assets/total_liabilities reflect measurement-period-adjusted values from SRC_003 comparative (ADTRAN Networks acquisition closed Aug-2022; ASC 805 measurement period). FY2022 total_equity sourced from SRC_001 equity rollforward; consistent across SRC_003 and SRC_004 (1,303,613).
